task: Find a Single-Family House for Rent in Houston, TX with 1 bed.
graderReasoning: The agent successfully found a qualifying listing on Apartments.com for a 1-bedroom single-family house in Houston, TX. Evidence shows the agent reached the filtered Houston houses page and then the exact 1-bedroom houses URL: https://www.apartments.com/houses/houston-tx/1-bedrooms/. It opened the listing for 504 E 23rd St, Houston, TX 77008, where the page explicitly showed: 1 bedroom, 1 bathroom, 864 sq ft, rent $1,600, and in Home Details the Home Type was 'Single Family Detached Home.' The final response accurately reported this matching listing and link.
final_result_response:
I found a matching listing on Apartments.com:

**504 E 23rd St, Houston, TX 77008**  
- **Type:** Single Family Detached Home  
- **Beds/Baths:** 1 bed, 1 bath  
- **Size:** 864 sq ft  
- **Rent:** $1,600/month total monthly price  
- **Lease:** 12 months  
- **Available:** Available now, property available 6/13/26  
- **Link:** https://www.apartments.com/504-e-23rd-st-houston-tx/1vy8fl7/

The page explicitly lists the **Home Type** as **Single Family Detached Home**.
action_history: Opening Apartments.com: const p1 = await openTab('https://www.apartments.com/');
Opening Houston houses for rent: await page.locator('e65').click();
Confirming bed filter and reading results: await page.locator('e1290').click();
Opening a likely matching listing: await openTab('https://www.apartments.com/1135-woodland-st-houston-tx/fn8610s/');
Checking another one-bedroom house listing: await openTab('https://www.apartments.com/504-e-23rd-st-houston-tx/1vy8fl7/');
